item.title: This. Seriously.
item.description: Wonder how long til this gets censored or have feds politely kick my door down for inciting ... Fp Edit: While Roe vs Wade was being blasted everywhere, we lost our Miranda Rights. We no longer have the right to remain silent - silence is an admission of guilt and will be persecuted to the highest order possible. Literally, we are now damned if we do, damned if we don't. Are you mad yet, People? Get out and protest this July 4th. Walk out of your corporate jobs and quit giving your tax dollars to these fucking criminals! EDIT 2: it was requested that I cite sources about Miranda Rights. We can no longer seek legal recourse if our 5th Amendment Rights are violated, Supreme Court Ruling as of 3 days ago. https://www.aclu.org/news/civil-liberties/supreme-court-rejects-promise-miranda-rights https://www.nytimes.com/2022/06/23/us/politics/supreme-court-miranda-lawsuits.html https://www.newsweek.com/supreme-courts-miranda-rights-decision-ripped-lawmakers-legal-experts-1718718 How many more links ya'll want?
item.dc:creator: TrixNStix

item.title: Can we all just appreciate Minnesota for giving a big FUCK YOU to Reagan back in 1984. Glorious.
item.description: I’m proud of my state. Not only are we going to be a safe haven for abortions, we also haven’t voted red since 1972, the longest streak in American history. We also routinely have a budget surplus and rank near the top in all quality of life metrics. Rest of the country, be more like Minnesota, voting-wise at least.
item.dc:creator: kickmyballsrealhard

item.title: For all the pro-lifers who actually want to understand:
item.dc:creator: PeopleDust

item.title: Stay Safe Out There!
item.description: A couple of other things.. they no longer need to state your Miranda rights, meaning you don't have the right to sue them if they fail to do so. Also if you do not specifically say that you are invoking your right to an attorney/lawyer they will likely dismiss it and say you weren't clear in your request. KEEP SAFE!
item.dc:creator: punkishgoddess

item.title: Woman responds to AZ Governor’s praise of Roe v Wade reversal: ‘Your son made me take plan B after we hooked up”
item.description: “I am proud that Arizona has been ranked the most pro-life state in the country. Here, we will continue to cherish life and protect it in every way possible,” he wrote in a subsequent tweet. But things soon got awkward when a Twitter user quote-tweeted Ducey’s post, claiming his son made her take a pregnancy-blocking drug after the two allegedly had a tryst. https://twitter.com/neenaab3/status/1540427762556477440
item.dc:creator: doxydad1

item.title: Let's not forget
item.description: Abortion is the person's choice. It shouldn't matter whether the reason is ectopic pregnancy or the person's choice.

item.title: When a big cat is your friend.
item.dc:creator: Cyberball2073

item.title: I’d watch this for 90 minutes
item.description: An international friendly between the women's national teams of Venezuela and Chile had an invader take over the pitch during the first half of their Saturday match. However, it wasn't a person. A dog ran onto the pitch in the 37th minute, making friends with members of both teams and even the referee. While Venezuela went on to win 1-0, the unexpected pitch invader was undoubtedly the star of the show. Sauce: https://bleacherreport.com/articles/10039933-dog-runs-onto-field-during-chile-vs-venezuela-2022-womens-international-friendly
item.dc:creator: ADegenFromUpcountry

item.title: Michael Rapaport has a few words for Clarence Thomas
item.description: I know it's evil TT, but I still felt this needed to be shared. The shit he and everyone else is angry about is more important than whatever distaste we may have for a social media platform.
item.dc:creator: MizWeirdo

item.title: I'm due for a mid life crisis any moment now.
item.description:
Today, I am 29.
I'm in the last year of my twenties, and I want to celebrate with all my elder emos the only way I know how: stolen memes.
I better make this year count. Today, I just want to blare Good Charlotte color my hair black, and immediately regret it.
Finding Emo
Both.
Stomp, clap, hey was my senior year.
I did a number on myself with the dumb tattoos I got at 18. Just waiting for a few thousand dollars to fall in my lap so I can get them covered up.
& no, neither of these tattoos are mine....but they just as easily could have been.
I locked myself in my Nana's bathroom for 2 hours after I accidentally stained her tub blue. Guess that's why it's called "Manic Panic" Maybe that's where the anxiety began.
Imma be sliding into my 30s like:
I'm adopting this murder floof shaped black void as my cat tax for this dump.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka
